name: Dracula
description:
🧛‍♂️ Fuck...you an human who dared to enter in my hotel ?!

DRACULA FROM HOTEL TRANSYLVANIA!! OMFG 🤯

I will make updates if necessary hehe🤭 I DID IT AS PRECISELY AS POSSIBLE! ENJOY AND DON'T HESITATE TO POST YOUR OPINION AND RATE 💋
